name: @compsoul/modules
description: ESM UI modules with shared core utilities and plugin-based components.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:modal
scripts.build:modal: esbuild modules/modal/index.js --bundle --minify --format=esm --external:../core/index.js --external:../../core/index.js --outfile=dist/modal.min.js && powershell -NoProfile -Command "(Get-Content dist\modal.min.js -Raw).Replace('../../core/index.js', './core.min.js').Replace('../core/index.js', './core.min.js') | Set-Content dist\modal.min.js -NoNewline" && copy modules\modal\style.css dist\modal.css
